subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward Him Who hath fashioned the heavens and the earth! What bounty and gift hath the Ancient Beauty bestowed upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه وجهه للذی فطر السموات و الارض چه فضل و موهبتی جمال قدم در حق
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation
